construction: 1500-message mailbox: real Enron base plus sparse controlled implants. Surface issues are intentionally small; the deep Briar Cove / KCM chain requires cross-linking vendor setup, payment routing, conflict certification, duplicate deliverable, and records handling clues.

surface_01_client_entertainment_coding.theme: client entertainment / gift-log miscoding around a Houston baseball suite and split catering

surface_02_travel_preapproval_splitting.theme: travel and training costs split across cost centers to stay below preapproval review

surface_03_shared_data_subscription_logi.theme: shared named-user market/weather data subscription login and renewal coding concern

surface_04_community_donation_gift_bound.theme: community donation / public-official hospitality boundary and coding concern

deep_issue.theme: Briar Cove / KCM related-party vendor-control concern with approval splitting, incomplete vendor setup, DBA payment mismatch, possible family relationship, reused internal deliverables, release before conflict/scope completion, and records separation.

format_note: Synthetic implant emails are distributed across ENR-2001 ids, written in English Enron-style plain text, and serialized as 7bit us-ascii to avoid encoding artifacts that would reveal construction.
